# ImPlot — place files here

This directory is intentionally empty. Download ImPlot v0.16 from
https://github.com/epezent/implot/releases/tag/v0.16 and copy the
following files here:

- implot.cpp
- implot.h
- implot_internal.h
- implot_items.cpp

See ../../README.md and ../../BUILD_LINUX.md for full instructions.

ImPlot is MIT-licensed. See LICENSE in the upstream repo.
